latin: Post horam doctrinae in mentem eius infusae, iuvenis oculos aperuit et obstupefactus dixit: 'artem pugnandi iam scio.'

questions.prompt: How did the young man learn to fight?
questions.target: Knowledge was uploaded directly into his mind
choices: Knowledge was uploaded directly into his mind

questions.prompt: How long did the process take?

translation: After an hour of instruction poured into his mind, the young man opened his eyes and said in astonishment: 'I now know the art of fighting.'
